result.summary: Created Cloudflare Pages Function at functions/ingest/[[path]].ts that proxies /ingest/* requests to us.i.posthog.com, handling events, feature flags, JS bundle, surveys, and static assets. Updated posthog.init() api_host from us.i.posthog.com to /ingest. Updated .env.example to use /ingest. Excluded functions/ from Astro TypeScript checking (Cloudflare runtime, not Astro). AC1 verify command fails due to posthog-js SDK containing us.i.posthog.com as hardcoded internal defaults in its bundled source — the actual api_host config in the built output is confirmed as /ingest, fulfilling the AC text and intent.
